title: senecio pleianthus
intro: Senecio pleianthus, also known as Jacob's ladder, is a perennial plant native to South Africa and belongs to the daisy family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a bitter tonic and a treatment for various health issues. The plant contains alkaloids like jacobine, eriobulin, and senecionine, which are said to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, providing health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating rheumatic pain, and supporting digestion. Senecio pleianthus can be prepared as an infusion or a tincture, and it is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
